industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Ocean Thermal Energy Corporation
summary: Ocean Thermal Energy Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, develops projects for renewable power generation, desalinated water production, and air conditioning in the United States and internationally. It designs and develops ocean thermal energy conversion, and seawater and lake water air conditioning plants for commercial properties, utilities, and municipalities. The company's plant produces electricity; fresh water for agriculture and human consumption; and desalinated water for potable, agricultural, and fish farming/aquaculture uses. Ocean Thermal Energy Corporation has strategic relationships with DCO Energy, LLC, Naval Energies, and the Sky Institute for plant construction, design, and architectural services, as well as funding of projects. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Lancaster, Pennsylvania.
